title: Opportunity
description: A single Idea in the Opportunity Management v2 discovery spine (Venture -> Initiative -> Idea). An idea is a stable, product-agnostic demand asset. v2 change vs #014: it carries a coarse t-shirt 'complexity' instead of 'estimate.storyPoints' (story points cannot be estimated without a target product; they live on use-cases). '<slug>.opportunity.json' files sit in the venture 'records/' pool. SaaS-ready: tenantId / workspaceId are reserved and carry no behavior in the file-based store.

schemaVersion.description: Contract version this document was authored against (e.g. '2.0.0').

tenantId.description: Reserved for the future multi-tenant SaaS layer; null in the local store.

workspaceId.description: Reserved workspace scope for the future SaaS layer; null in the local store.

id.description: Stable unique idea id (asset identity; use-cases reference it via implementsIdeaRefs).

slug.description: Filesystem-friendly slug, also the '<slug>.opportunity.json' filename stem.

origin.description: How the idea entered the funnel.

selected.description: Whether this variant is the chosen one.

scores.description: Coarse evaluation scores, each an integer 1-5 or null when not yet scored.

complexity.description: Coarse, product-agnostic t-shirt complexity (replaces v1 estimate.storyPoints, #015 open question 1). Deliberately non-numeric so it stays visually distinct from real story points, which live on use-cases. Null until assessed.

volunteers.description: Supply signal ('I would work on this', hammers).

aiAmbassador.description: Optional AI persona championing the idea.

domain.description: Business domain the idea belongs to (e.g. 'hr').
